title: Make execplan scaffolds projection-complete by default
goal: Implement #515 by making newly promoted execplan records carry the compact projection fields summary expects.
Keep the fix inside the existing planning scaffold path instead of adding a new command or extra first-line surface.
non_goals: Do not add a new planner workflow command.
Do not make summary accept incomplete active records silently.
Do not broaden default startup or report payloads.

intent.outcome: agents can promote a bounded work item to an execplan without rediscovering required projection fields during closeout
intent.constraints: prefer existing scaffold/promote machinery; keep summary projection checks meaningful
intent.latitude: may add default scaffold fields and focused tests
intent.escalation: stop if the fix requires changing planning schema semantics or hiding real active-plan drift

execution.next_step: archive plan, close #515, and continue the next workflow-friction-polish slice

invariants: summary should still warn for genuinely incomplete hand-authored active records
promote-to-plan should remain the existing scaffold path
generated records should validate against planning-execplan.schema.json

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: remove small package-use friction discovered during dogfooding

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #515 closes, continue the next workflow-friction-polish issue or refreshed higher-priority issue

iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: broader structured-first authoring helpers remain in the later lane
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: package installer tests and planning surface checks
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue #522 or refreshed next workflow-friction-polish issue

intent_interpretation.literal request: Make execplan scaffolds projection-complete by default.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Reduce plan-authoring repair loops while preserving summary warnings for real drift.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Patch the existing scaffold builder and tests.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that no new command or default payload expansion was introduced.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning scaffold builder, package installer tests, active plan/state
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "promote_todo_item_to_execplan"; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py --strict

stop_conditions.stop when: the only viable fix hides missing-field warnings instead of creating better scaffolds
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: schema or summary projection contracts need redesign
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: promoted scaffold cannot be made projection-complete without broad package changes

context_budget.live working set: installer scaffold builder and focused installer tests
context_budget.externalize before shift: record proof and closeout in this plan
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: none; issue and package code are sufficient
context_budget.tiny resumability note: add context_budget defaults to _build_execplan_record_from_todo_item and assert promoted summaries project cleanly
context_budget.context-shift triggers: before commit, after proof failure, or if summary semantics need broad changes

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Complete #515 without adding workflow surface area.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Use existing promote-to-plan scaffold path; preserve summary drift detection.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: field text, exact focused tests, and closeout residue routing.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: projection completeness requires changing active-summary contracts.

immediate_next_action: Patch the scaffold builder and tests.
invariants: Summary warning behavior remains useful for incomplete records.
completion_criteria: Promoted execplan records include context-budget fields by default.
A promoted active execplan has present iterative/context projections in summary.
Focused package tests and planning surface checks pass.

execution_run.what happened: Added projection-complete default sections to promoted execplan records and normalized planned/next promotions to active in-progress plan records.
execution_run.scope touched: planning scaffold builder, installer tests, active plan/state
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "promote_todo_item_to_execplan"; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py --strict
execution_run.result for continuation: #515 complete; workflow-friction-polish continues with #522 or refreshed higher-priority work.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; changed existing scaffold path and tests without adding a command or default payload
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; promoted records now include projection fields and active promoted work-items project cleanly
finished_run_review.config compliance: used compact summary/proof/report/reconcile/doctor surfaces and subagent inspection

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: use existing scaffold machinery and checks instead of adding surface area
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this reduce plan-authoring repair loops without hiding real drift?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: Bounded #515 slice complete; parent workflow-friction-polish lane remains open.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: packages/planning tests/test_installer.py, package ruff, planning doctor, planning surfaces, and proof selection passed.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen #515 if promoted execplans miss active summary projection fields or need manual projection-field repair.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Generated execplan scaffolds should be projection-complete with pending defaults rather than relying on closeout-time repair.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Plan promotion is cheaper when the scaffold immediately supports summary, handoff, context-budget, and closeout projections.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: when execplan projection sections or promote-to-plan scaffold behavior changes

execution_summary.outcome delivered: promote-to-plan scaffolds now include projection-complete pending sections and ready/next promotions become active plan records
execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused and full planning installer tests, package ruff, planning doctor, proof selection, and planning-surface checks passed
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): none; code and tests are sufficient durable residue

signals found: Subagent inspection confirmed the builder, not the template, was the missing scaffold path.
Focused testing showed ready work-item promotion created a plan record but did not project as an active planning_record until planned status was normalized.
signals fixed: #515 fixed by projection-complete builder defaults and active-status normalization.
signals routed: Remaining workflow-friction-polish issues stay in state.toml.
signals dismissed: No new command or first-line surface was needed.
